title: Mirror Column "Descriptions" Not Carrying From Parent Column To Mirrored Instances
excerpt: Parent board column “descriptions” in the descriptions field don’t carry to mirrored instances. They should carry over, and edits made in the mirrored column “description” instances/parent instance should update in all i…

posts.author: andrewst (Tyler Andrews)
posts.cookedHtml: Parent board column “descriptions” in the descriptions field don’t carry to mirrored instances. They should carry over, and edits made in the mirrored column “description” instances/parent instance should update in all instances.
